allow: PowerShell($excel = New-Object -ComObject Excel.Application; $excel.Visible = $false; $excel.DisplayAlerts = $false; $wb = $excel.Workbooks.Open\("c:\\Users\\HarishKumar\\Downloads\\Automation_Orgo\\Automation_Orgo_UI_Test\\Automation_Orgo_UI_Test\\src\\main\\resources\\TestData_Trail.xlsx"\); $sheet = $wb.Sheets.Item\("Lab"\); for \($r = 64; $r -le 68; $r++\) { $line = "Row$\($r-1\)\(0idx\): "; for \($c = 1; $c -le 12; $c++\) { $line += "[$\($c-1\)]=$\($sheet.Cells.Item\($r,$c\).Text\)  " }; Write-Host $line }; $h = "HDR: "; for \($c = 1; $c -le 12; $c++\) { $h += "[$\($c-1\)]=$\($sheet.Cells.Item\(25,$c\).Text\)  " }; Write-Host $h; $wb.Close\($false\); $excel.Quit\(\); [System.Runtime.InteropServices.Marshal]::ReleaseComObject\($excel\) | Out-Null)
